text.title: First 5 Paying Customers Checklist Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: MVP shipped AND zero paid customers AND ≥6 weeks runway available?

branch.when: mvp_shipped == true AND paid_customers == 0 AND runway_weeks >= 6
